synopsis: A stunning survival horror FPS set in the tunnels beneath post-nuclear Moscow, following Artyom on a desperate mission through the haunted Metro stations and irradiated surface. Bullets serve as both currency and ammunition. The Redux version delivers completely reworked AI, mechanics, and visual upgrades. Based on Dmitry Glukhovsky's acclaimed novel.

name: Metro Exodus
synopsis: Artyom and the Spartan Rangers flee the Moscow Metro aboard a steam locomotive in a cross-Russia journey through devastated open biomes — Volga, Caspian Desert, Taiga and Dead City. It dramatically expands Metro's world beyond the tunnels while retaining the survival horror atmosphere and human story. The Enhanced Edition adds ray-tracing of extraordinary visual quality.

name: Mortal Kombat 11
synopsis: NetherRealm's most polished fighting game delivers a fan-service story mode where past and present versions of the entire MK roster clash through time manipulation, alongside some of the most technically intricate fighting mechanics in the franchise. Its extensive customisation system for moves and gear allows players to build personal versions of every fighter.

name: Need for Speed: Heat
synopsis: NFS returns to its Underground roots in Palm City, a fictional Miami-inspired city where players race legitimately by day for prize money and evade corrupted cops in illegal night races for rep. Its day/night structure and deep car customisation are the strongest in the series in years. The cops are genuinely menacing and create tense pursuits.

name: Need for Speed: Rivals
synopsis: A seamless world racer where Racers and Cops exist simultaneously on the same map, creating emergent player-versus-player pursuits. Its AllDrive system meant single-player and multiplayer shared one open world. The car selection was strong and the sense of speed remained characteristic Criterion quality despite the studio's limited involvement.

name: Panzer Corps
synopsis: The definitive operational WWII hex-based strategy game, covering every major theatre with historical accuracy and extensive unit rosters from early Blitzkrieg through the fall of Berlin. Its prestige system lets players build a personalised veteran corps carried across the entire Grand Campaign. The Eastern Front expansion is considered one of the finest wargames ever produced.

name: Panzer Corps 2
synopsis: The definitive operational WWII hex-based strategy game, covering every major theatre with historical accuracy and extensive unit rosters from early Blitzkrieg through the fall of Berlin. Its prestige system lets players build a personalised veteran corps carried across the entire Grand Campaign. The Eastern Front expansion is considered one of the finest wargames ever produced.

name: PAYDAY 2
synopsis: One of gaming's longest-running co-op heist shooters, PAYDAY 2 lets players plan and execute elaborate bank robberies, drug operations, and museum heists across hundreds of available missions. Its build system with skills, masks, weapons and stealth-versus-loud approaches creates extraordinary replay value. Ten years of DLC and updates have built a dedicated crime community.

name: Portal
synopsis: Valve's revolutionary puzzle game challenges players to solve increasingly complex spatial puzzles using a portal gun that creates paired wormholes on surfaces. GLaDOS, the passive-aggressive AI managing the Aperture Science facility, delivers some of gaming's greatest writing. At under two hours, Portal is the most perfectly paced game Valve has ever made.

name: Prince of Persia: The Two Thrones
Quantum Break
synopsis: Remedy's ambitious blend of time-stop action gameplay and live-action TV drama interwoven between chapters, following protagonist Jack Joyce who gains time manipulation powers during a catastrophic experiment. Each player choice affects the parallel live-action episodes. Its visual style is exceptional and its story surprisingly moving despite the awkward format.

name: Red Dead Redemption 2
synopsis: Arthur Morgan's story as a loyal outlaw navigating an America being strangled by modernity is gaming's most emotionally resonant open world epic. Rockstar's attention to detail creates a world where strangers have their own stories. Its epilogue following John Marston is among the most poignant game endings ever written. The PS4 version is technically remarkable.

name: Rise of the Tomb Raider
synopsis: Lara Croft pursues the secret of immortality to Siberia and Syria against the fanatical Trinity organisation in Crystal Dynamics' finest Tomb Raider entry. Its crafting, bow-centric combat, and gorgeous environments represent the series at its best. The season pass content, particularly Blood Ties and Baba Yaga, expanded the experience substantially.

name: Sid Meier's Civilization VI
synopsis: The sixth Civilization introduces a groundbreaking district system that physically separates cities into specialized zones — science campuses, industrial zones, holy sites — requiring genuine urban planning. Leaders feature stylised animated portraits with era-specific attitudes. The Rise and Fall and Gathering Storm expansions added loyalty mechanics and climate change as strategic factors.

name: Sifu
synopsis: A third-person kung fu action game following a young martial artist on a revenge quest against five assassins who killed their father, aging with each death but never truly dying. Its combat system demands real mastery of parries, evades and chain attacks. On Platinum difficulty it is one of gaming's most demanding and rewarding skill-tests.

name: SOULCALIBUR VI
synopsis: The weapons-based fighting franchise returns to 1590 and retells the events of the original SoulCalibur with expanded lore and two new modes — Libra of Soul RPG and Soul Chronicle story campaigns. Geralt of Rivia from The Witcher is the standout guest character. Its Reversal Edge and Soul Charge mechanics create deeper defensive and offensive options.

name: South Park: The Stick of Truth
synopsis: The New Kid arrives in South Park and joins the children's fantasy LARPing game that quickly spirals into saving the world. Obsidian and Matt Stone/Trey Parker's collaboration produces a game that looks and feels exactly like playing an episode of the show. Its crude humour is extraordinary in context, and its turn-based RPG mechanics are genuinely satisfying.

name: Steel Division: Normandy 44
synopsis: An operational WWII RTS focusing on the Normandy campaign with extraordinary historical accuracy — real unit designations, equipment and doctrine. Its three-phase battle system that divides each engagement into A, B and C phases creates dynamic front-line management. Its depth approaches wargame territory while remaining playable for RTS veterans.

name: Tales from the Borderlands
synopsis: Telltale's finest work, following con artist Fiona and Hyperion corporate lackey Rhys whose heist-gone-wrong story across Pandora is narrated in flashback to an intimidating masked figure. Its humour is extraordinary, its character writing emotional and its ending genuinely moving. Many players consider it better than any of the mainline Borderlands entries.

name: TEKKEN 7
synopsis: The seventh mainline entry concludes the saga of the Mishima blood war with a cinematic story mode revealing Kazuya's backstory and bringing the conflict to a brutal conclusion. Its Rage Drive and Rage Art mechanics create dramatic comeback potential. Guest characters including Noctis and Geese Howard were controversial but kept the roster discussions lively.

name: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Game of the Year Edition
synopsis: The fourth Elder Scrolls follows the player character escaping prison to protect the heir of the Septim bloodline as Oblivion gates spill daedra across Tamriel. Its fully voiced world, radiant AI and extraordinary mod support made it one of PC gaming's landmark experiences. The Dark Brotherhood assassination questline remains Bethesda's finest narrative design.

name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim Special Edition
synopsis: The Special Edition remaster of gaming's most ubiquitous RPG with improved visuals, mod support on console and all three DLC included — Dawnguard, Hearthfire and Dragonborn. Players create the Dragonborn, who alone can absorb dragon souls and use the Thu'um to shout enemies into oblivion. Its enduring modding community has extended its life across 15 years.

name: The Sims 4
synopsis: EA's life simulation franchise went free-to-play in 2022, making its vast library of expansion packs, game packs and stuff packs accessible to everyone. Players create and control virtual people across homes, careers and relationships with extraordinary creativity tools. Its modding community has produced content of remarkable quality including full overhauls.

name: The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings Enhanced Edition
synopsis: The pivotal second Witcher game established CD Projekt Red as a premier RPG studio with branching story paths that create completely different second acts depending on who Geralt sides with. Its political intrigue, morally complex characters and exceptional writing laid the foundation for The Witcher 3. The Enhanced Edition is the definitive version.

name: Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six Siege
synopsis: The definitive tactical multiplayer shooter where asymmetric attack/defend matches, destructible environments and unique Operator abilities create emergent situations impossible to plan for. Its 60+ Operators — each with distinct gadgets — create a meta that continuously evolves across seasons. From a rough launch it became one of the longest-running active esports titles.

name: Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six Siege - Test Server
Tom Clancy's The Division
synopsis: An open world third-person shooter set in a quarantined Manhattan weeks after a virus-covered dollar bill outbreak, where Division sleeper agents attempt to restore order amid civil chaos. Its atmospheric snow-covered recreation of New York and the Dark Zone PvPvE mechanic were genuinely innovative. Post-launch content substantially improved the base game.

name: Total War: ATTILA
synopsis: Set during the twilight of the Roman Empire, players can either defend civilisation against the incoming Hunnic invasion or play as Attila himself to bring fire and sword across Europe. Its burning mechanics, apocalyptic migrations and challenging Roman survival scenarios make it one of the most atmospheric and difficult Total War entries.

name: Total War: MEDIEVAL II - Definitive Edition
Total War: ROME II - Emperor Edition
Total War: ROME REMASTERED
synopsis: A remaster of the 2004 original that launched the modern Total War era, updating the game to 4K with improved models while preserving the strategic and tactical essence that made it legendary. Players guide one of three Roman families or barbarian factions to Mediterranean domination. The remaster's fidelity to the original divides fans expecting more substantial changes.

name: Two Point Hospital
synopsis: A spiritual successor to Theme Hospital from the original team, placing players in charge of increasingly absurd hospitals treating fictional diseases like 'Boggled Mind' and 'Fake Plague'. Its dry British humour, satire-filled radio station and genuine management depth make it one of the most delightful simulation games of the decade. The Creative Hospital DLC expanded building tools significantly.

name: Unity of Command II
synopsis: The cleanest and most elegant WWII wargame available, focusing on supply lines and encirclement as the core strategic concepts through a comprehensive WW2 campaign spanning Rommel's Tunisia to the fall of Berlin. Its streamlined design eliminates tedium while preserving authentic operational decisions. Considered the gateway wargame for strategy players seeking historical depth.

name: Victoria II
synopsis: Paradox's 19th century grand strategy simulation covering industrialisation, colonialism, class politics and nationalism from 1836 to 1936. Its pop system simulates every citizen's political beliefs, job and wealth creating emergent social revolutions. Despite its age and interface limitations, it remains the most sophisticated simulation of the Victorian era in any medium.

name: Wolfenstein: The New Order
synopsis: A cinematic FPS set in an alternate 1960s where the Nazis won WWII, following BJ Blazkowicz's one-man resistance against an Orwellian fascist regime. MachineGames combined extraordinary action set-pieces with surprisingly thoughtful character writing that made BJ one of gaming's most compelling protagonists. Its sequel The New Colossus was even more ambitious.

name: Wolfenstein: The Old Blood
synopsis: A standalone prequel to The New Order following BJ Blazkowicz infiltrating Castle Wolfenstein in an homage to the original games. Its two-part structure — escape from Wolfenstein and a supernatural zombie outbreak — makes for a shorter but entertaining Wolfenstein experience. The stealth mechanics and dual pipe weapons are highlights.

name: XCOM 2
synopsis: Set 20 years after XCOM's failure, humanity lives under alien occupation as a propaganda-backed utopia and players command guerrilla forces aboard the Avenger mobile base. Its pod-based ambush system, timer-based missions and brutal permanent death for soldiers create extraordinary tension. War of the Chosen adds three nemesis faction aliens who dynamically hunt your squad.

name: XCOM: Chimera Squad
synopsis: A standalone spinoff following XCOM: 2's aftermath as human and alien agents form Chimera Squad to maintain peace in the integrated City 31. Breach mode — coordinated simultaneous entry through windows and doors — creates the series' most spectacular tactical moments. Its fixed named characters with unique abilities replace the traditional soldier customisation.

name: A Plague Tale: Requiem
synopsis: Amicia and Hugo de Runa continue their desperate journey across a sun-drenched southern France, with Hugo's curse growing stronger and more dangerous as the rat plague follows wherever they go. Its rat swarm mechanics scale to terrifying proportions and the emotional sibling story reaches devastating conclusions. Visually it stands among the most beautiful games of its generation.

name: Alan Wake 2
synopsis: Remedy's genre-defining survival horror sequel follows both FBI agent Saga Anderson investigating ritual murders in Bright Falls and Alan Wake himself trapped in the Dark Place — a nightmarish version of New York where fiction becomes reality. Its live-action sequences, layered metafiction and stunning visuals represent the most artistically ambitious game Remedy has ever produced.

name: Balatro
synopsis: A poker-based roguelite where players build increasingly broken card hands and joker combinations to beat rising blind targets. Its deceptively simple rules mask extraordinary strategic depth — players discover game-breaking synergies that make each run feel like discovering a cheat code. It was the most talked-about indie release of 2024 and became a genuine cultural moment.

name: Banishers: Ghosts of New Eden
synopsis: Ghost hunters Antea Duarte and Red mac Raith arrive in colonial New England to banish a terrible haunting but find their mission complicated when Antea herself becomes a ghost. Players switch between living and ghost gameplay as they investigate five haunting cases, with moral choices determining whether Antea can return to the living. A touching supernatural love story.

name: Borderlands 3
synopsis: The four Vault Hunters face the Calypso Twins — streaming influencer cult leaders — across Pandora, Promethea, Eden-6 and Athenas in a campaign of spectacular gunplay chaos. With over a billion procedurally generated guns, a genuinely improved story over previous entries and four radically different character builds, it delivered exactly what fans expected from the series.

name: Call of Duty: Black Ops III
Crash Bandicoot 4: It's About Time
synopsis: A direct sequel to Crash Bandicoot 3: Warped following Crash and Coco acquiring reality-altering Quantum Masks that modify the environment and physics. Its brutally challenging N.Verted and N.Sanely Perfect relic time trials demand mastery of every mechanic. Visually stunning and mechanically tight, it's the finest 3D Crash since the Naughty Dog originals.

name: Diablo IV
synopsis: The fourth mainline entry in Blizzard's seminal ARPG franchise takes a darker, more gothic tone as five playable classes battle the demon lord Lilith in a massive open world Sanctuary. Its seasonal content model has delivered substantial post-launch stories and mechanics. The endgame at launch was criticised but Season of the Malignant substantially improved the experience.

name: Ghost of Tsushima Director's Cut
synopsis: The Director's Cut of Sucker Punch's samurai epic adds the Iki Island expansion with a new story confronting Jin Sakai's past trauma and spiritual healing. The expanded Director's Cut includes Legends multiplayer, new accessibility options and the stunning PS5 enhancements — 60fps, haptic feedback for every sword strike, and jaw-dropping load times.

name: Ghostwire: Tokyo
synopsis: Virtually all of Tokyo's population has vanished and supernatural Visitors stalk the rain-slicked streets. Akito Inui — partially possessed by a spirit hunter called KK — explores a meticulously recreated Tokyo using weaving spells called Ethereal Weaving to exorcise these spectres. Its folklore-rich world and unique combat make it one of the most distinctive games on PS5.

name: God of War Ragnarok
synopsis: Kratos and Atreus journey across the Nine Realms as Fimbulwinter descends and Ragnarök draws near. Santa Monica expanded every system from 2018 with more weapons, bigger worlds and more complex combat while delivering a narrative that rivals prestige television. Freya's arc, the Atreus chapters and Brok's story are among the most emotionally resonant in any game.

name: Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered
synopsis: A comprehensive remaster of Guerrilla's 2017 open-world masterpiece featuring fully rebuilt character models, upgraded environments, enhanced motion capture for all dialogue scenes and PS5 DualSense integration. Aloy's journey to uncover the truth behind Earth's mechanical creatures and her own origins remains one of gaming's most satisfying mysteries. Essential for newcomers to the series.

name: LEGO Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga
Marvel's Spider-Man 2
synopsis: Both Peter Parker and Miles Morales share the screen as protagonists across a massive expanded New York City adding Queens and Brooklyn, facing Kraven the Hunter and the symbiote invasion that brings Venom into a devastating personal conflict with Peter. Its web-swing traversal system, switching between heroes and spectacular set-pieces make it the definitive superhero game experience.

name: Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales
synopsis: Miles Morales takes over from Peter Parker to protect a gentrifying Harlem in an intimate Christmas-set story about community, family and discovering his own powers — including bio-electric Venom blasts and invisibility. Its 7-hour campaign is tightly focused and emotionally resonant in ways the original didn't always achieve. The PS5 version runs at 60fps with ray-traced reflections.

name: Mortal Kombat 1
synopsis: A timeline reset following Liu Kang's creation of a new era, Mortal Kombat 1 redesigns the franchise's iconic characters as variants shaped by Liu Kang's new history. The Kameo Fighter system — choosing an assist character — adds unprecedented combo extension options. Its cinematic story mode is the best in the franchise's history, and the roster covers returning favourites and notable new faces.

name: Nioh 2 Remastered
synopsis: The complete remaster of Team Ninja's supernatural samurai RPG set in Sengoku-era Japan, following half-spirit warrior Hide navigating yokai-infested battlefields. The Remaster includes all three DLC expansions — The Tengu's Disciple, Darkness in the Capital and The First Samurai — and runs at 60fps with 4K support on PS5. Its combat is among the most demanding and satisfying in the genre.

name: Persona 5 Tactica
synopsis: The Phantom Thieves are transported to a parallel feudal world dominated by a revolutionary army and must fight to escape using a new tactical grid-based combat system with triple-action turns, unique character abilities and enemy envelopment mechanics. Its story provides new insight into each Thief's motivations. Designed as an accessible entry point for tactical RPG newcomers.

name: Prince of Persia: The Lost Crown
synopsis: A 2.5D Metroidvania set in the mythical Mount Qaf where elite warrior Sargon searches for the kidnapped Prince Ghassan, gaining time manipulation powers to navigate corrupted timelines. Developed by Ubisoft's classic platformer studio, it revived the Prince of Persia brand with universal acclaim. Its challenge modes, Speedrunner optimisation and new Persian hero are highlights.

name: Returnal
synopsis: Selene Vassos crashes on the planet Atropos and finds herself trapped in a time loop, dying and restarting — but retaining memories of her previous cycles. Its bullet-hell combat, alien world exploration and Lynchian psychological horror narrative make it one of PS5's most demanding and distinctive experiences. The DualSense implementation — adaptive triggers for each weapon — is extraordinary.

name: Sackboy: A Big Adventure
synopsis: Sumo Digital's delightful 3D platformer follows Sackboy on a journey through Craftworld to defeat the evil Vex, featuring extraordinarily tactile fabric-and-craft aesthetics and joyful co-op for up to four players. Its level design references classic platform games while feeling distinctly its own. The music levels — synced to licensed songs including Uptown Funk — are exceptional highlights.

name: Star Wars Outlaws
synopsis: The first open-world Star Wars game follows scoundrel Kay Vess and her creature companion Nix across multiple planets between Empire Strikes Back and Return of the Jedi, running heists for criminal syndicates. Its faction reputation system and seamless space travel between worlds create the most authentic Star Wars adventure outside the films. Speeder bike traversal and stealth sequences are highlights.

name: The Last of Us Part II Remastered
synopsis: The definitive version of Naughty Dog's controversial masterpiece adds No Return — a roguelike survival mode with unique scenarios and character-specific runs — alongside behind-the-scenes commentary, guitar free play and multiple new accessibility options. The 60fps and haptic DualSense implementation transforms the combat experience. Its central story remains one of gaming's most divisive and powerful narratives.

name: Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 1+2
synopsis: Vicarious Visions' faithful ground-up recreation of the first two Tony Hawk games recreates every original level and trick system with spectacular modern visuals. The nostalgia of landing perfect runs in Warehouse or School II is fully preserved. Online multiplayer brings competitive skating to a whole new generation of players worldwide.

name: Tunic
synopsis: A tiny fox in a mysterious land must uncover the secrets of an ancient civilisation guided only by pages of an in-game instruction manual written in an alien language that players must themselves decipher. Its Zelda-inspired exploration, tough combat and meta-puzzle design create one of the most clever and rewarding adventure games ever made.

name: Uncharted: Legacy of Thieves Collection
synopsis: The PS5 remaster of Uncharted 4: A Thief's End and Uncharted: The Lost Legacy, running at 60fps with enhanced textures and new accessibility options. Drake's final adventure across the search for Libertalia and Chloe Frazer's standalone Hoysala Empire story are both among the finest cinematic action-adventure games in the medium. The PC version arrived on Steam in 2022.

name: Warhammer 40000: Boltgun
synopsis: A retro boomer shooter set in the 40K universe following Space Marine Malum Caedo through the Forge World of Graia at breakneck speed, slaughtering Chaos Space Marines and daemonic forces with a glorious arsenal from the bolter to the power sword. Its pixel-art-inspired aesthetic perfectly captures both old-school shooter design and Warhammer's grimdark aesthetic.

name: Warhammer 40000: Darktide
synopsis: Fatshark's Warhammer 40K version of Vermintide featuring four Rejects fighting through the Chaos-infested hive city of Tertium. Its shooting, melee and class customisation feel premium. The game's troubled launch saw significant features missing at release, but post-launch updates have transformed it into the definitive co-op 40K experience. The Imperial Guard Veteran and Psyker classes are particularly satisfying.

name: Weird West
synopsis: A dark fantasy reimagining of the American West follows five interconnected protagonists — a bounty hunter, pig man, werewolf, and more — through a world where sirens, wendigos and fallen angels haunt the frontier. WolfEye's immersive sim approach lets players approach every situation with emergent solutions. The interconnected narratives create a sense of a breathing world.

name: A Plague Tale: Innocence
synopsis: Amicia de Rune and her young brother Hugo flee Inquisition soldiers across a plague-ravaged 14th century France, using rat swarms as both obstacle and weapon. Its rat mechanics create extraordinary spectacle and genuine puzzle design. The sibling relationship at the centre is one of the most emotionally resonant in gaming, building to a devastating climactic sacrifice.

name: Adventure Time: Pirates of the Enchiridion
Batman: Return to Arkham - Arkham Asylum
Batman: Return to Arkham - Arkham City
Call of Duty: Black Ops Cold War
DEATH STRANDING
synopsis: The first game from Hideo Kojima's post-Konami studio has Norman Reedus' Sam Porter Bridges reconnect a fragmenting post-apocalyptic America by physically carrying packages across treacherous terrain haunted by supernatural BTs. Its asynchronous multiplayer — sharing ropes, ladders and vehicles with other players' worlds — is a profound statement on human connection. Polarising but unforgettable.

name: Deep Rock Galactic
synopsis: Space dwarves drill through alien cave systems completing mining assignments against overwhelming insect hordes in gaming's most genuinely co-operative shooter. Four classes — Scout, Driller, Engineer and Gunner — complement each other uniquely. Its dev/community relationship and extraordinary co-op camaraderie have made it one of the highest-rated games on Steam with universal acclaim.

name: Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition
synopsis: The console definitive edition of Larian's masterpiece CRPG, featuring co-op for up to four players and a completely rebuilt third act. The elemental combination combat system, extraordinary companion writing and near-unlimited freedom to find solutions make this the finest RPG of the generation. Each of the six origin characters provides a completely different perspective on the story.

name: DOOM
synopsis: The definitive FPS experience with combat designed as an elaborate resource-management loop — chainsaw for ammo, glory kills for health, flame for armour — all while navigating and destroying waves of Hell's armies to a legendary Mick Gordon metal soundtrack. Its skill ceiling is extraordinarily high, rewarding mastery with the feeling of being unstoppable.

name: Dragon Ball Xenoverse
synopsis: Players create a custom Saiyan, Namekian, Frieza Race or other character who travels through Dragon Ball history as a Time Patroller protecting the timeline from changes. The hub world, character customisation and skill system create a surprisingly deep action RPG wrapped around 3D arena fighting. Seven years of DLC have made it the most content-rich Dragon Ball game ever released.

name: Earth Defense Force 4.1: The Shadow of New Despair
ENDER LILIES: Quietus of the Knights
Erica
synopsis: A trucking simulation game that lets players haul cargo across a beautifully recreated American Southwest spanning California, Nevada, Arizona and expanding states. The meditative drive across vast landscapes with a curated radio station is genuinely therapeutic and has attracted millions of players worldwide. Its active modding community continuously expands the map and vehicle roster.

name: FIFA 23
synopsis: The final game under the historic FIFA licence, delivering both men's and women's World Cups alongside the standard club football experience. HyperMotion2 brought new animation fidelity for female player likenesses. Its swansong nature made it a landmark for the franchise's 30-year history before the EA Sports FC rebrand.

name: Five Nights at Freddy's: Security Breach
God of War
synopsis: A reinvention of the God of War franchise following an older Kratos who has settled in Norse mythology with his young son Atreus. Their journey to scatter his late wife's ashes from the highest peak is a meditation on fatherhood, grief and breaking cycles of violence. The seamless single-shot camera technique and deeply emotional story won multiple Game of the Year awards.

name: Granblue Fantasy: Relink
synopsis: An action RPG set in the beloved Granblue Fantasy universe following Captain and their sky pirate crew on an adventure to Estalucia. Its exhilarating 4-player co-op boss raids, extraordinary character variety and spectacular visual design captured fans worldwide. The endgame's quest for stronger weapons provides hundreds of hours of rewarding loot progression.

name: Grand Theft Auto III - The Definitive Edition
Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas - The Definitive Edition
Grand Theft Auto: Vice City - The Definitive Edition
Mafia III
synopsis: Set in fictional New Bordeaux in 1968, Vietnam veteran Lincoln Clay dismantles the Italian mob that murdered his surrogate family in one of gaming's most boldly political stories about race and crime in the American South. Its authentic 1960s setting and excellent soundtrack are highlighted alongside repetitive mission design. The Definitive Edition includes all DLC.

name: Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy
synopsis: Players control Peter Quill commanding the team through decision-based narrative while managing their big mouths and bigger egos across an imaginative space adventure. Its inspired 80s soundtrack, genuinely funny writing and surprisingly deep Quill-as-leader mechanics make it one of the finest Marvel adaptations. Often overshadowed by Avengers' failure but completely superior in every way.

name: Marvel's Spider-Man
synopsis: Insomniac's spectacular take on an experienced Peter Parker balancing life, relationships and heroism across a stunning recreation of Manhattan. The web-swing traversal system remains the finest in any open world game, and its story delivers both authentic superhero spectacle and genuine emotional stakes. The Mister Negative arc and silver lining DLC are particular highlights.

name: Mass Effect Legendary Edition
synopsis: BioWare's remaster of all three original Mass Effect games plus most DLC content, delivering the complete Shepard trilogy in one package with extensive visual improvements, unified weapon systems and corrected balance. Playing Legendary Edition is still one of gaming's most emotionally overwhelming experiences — the accumulation of three games' relationships and choices builds to consequences of genuine weight.

name: Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor - Game of the Year Edition
Need for Speed
synopsis: NFS returns to its Underground roots in Palm City, a fictional Miami-inspired city where players race legitimately by day for prize money and evade corrupted cops in illegal night races for rep. Its day/night structure and deep car customisation are the strongest in the series in years. The cops are genuinely menacing and create tense pursuits.

name: Need For Speed Hot Pursuit Remastered
Nioh
synopsis: The complete remaster of Team Ninja's supernatural samurai RPG set in Sengoku-era Japan, following half-spirit warrior Hide navigating yokai-infested battlefields. The Remaster includes all three DLC expansions — The Tengu's Disciple, Darkness in the Capital and The First Samurai — and runs at 60fps with 4K support on PS5. Its combat is among the most demanding and satisfying in the genre.

name: Nioh 2
synopsis: A prequel to Nioh following Hide, a half-human half-yokai warrior in Sengoku Japan whose shapeshifter abilities and weapon variety surpass the original. Team Ninja's mastery of the souls-like formula produces some of the finest boss fights in the genre. Its deep build complexity and high skill ceiling reward hundreds of hours of investment.

name: Overcooked! All You Can Eat
synopsis: A collection of the first two Overcooked games plus all DLC in one package, featuring frantic cooking cooperation across increasingly absurd kitchen environments — medieval castles, moving trucks, haunted houses. Its accessibility and friendship-destroying difficulty make it the definitive couch co-op party game experience. The new accessibility features in All You Can Eat greatly expanded its audience.

name: Paw Patrol: Mighty Pups Save Adventure Bay!
Plants vs. Zombies: Battle for Neighborville
Skyrim
synopsis: The Special Edition remaster of gaming's most ubiquitous RPG with improved visuals, mod support on console and all three DLC included — Dawnguard, Hearthfire and Dragonborn. Players create the Dragonborn, who alone can absorb dragon souls and use the Thu'um to shout enemies into oblivion. Its enduring modding community has extended its life across 15 years.

name: Slay the Spire
synopsis: The definitive deckbuilding roguelite that popularised the genre, combining collectible card games with Darkest Dungeon-style dungeon crawling across three unique characters with distinct card pools. Each run's card and relic selection creates wildly different build paths that must synergise to overcome increasingly powerful enemies. Its near-perfect design has inspired dozens of imitators but no true equals.

name: SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle For Bikini Bottom - Rehydrated
Stardew Valley
synopsis: A solo-developed farming RPG that has sold over 35 million copies — created entirely by one developer — following a city worker who inherits their grandfather's farm in Pelican Town. Players farm, mine, fish, romance villagers and build community across four seasons. Its extraordinary depth and personal warmth have made it one of the most beloved games ever created.

name: Stray
synopsis: Players take the role of a stray cat navigating a cyberpunk city populated by robots after humanity has vanished, aided by a small drone called B-12 to interact with the world. Its extraordinary feline animation — scratching walls, knocking objects off shelves, meowing at robots — creates an immersive cat experience unlike any other game. Its emotional story about loss resonated enormously.

name: Subnautica
synopsis: Players crash-land on ocean planet 4546B and must survive, explore and eventually escape using only the resources around them — mining minerals, building underwater bases, farming alien fish and diving ever deeper to uncover a planetary mystery. Its freedom from violence and wonder-focused design make it one of the most unique survival games. The ending is genuinely moving.

name: The Elder Scrolls Online: Tamriel Unlimited
Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep: A Wonderlands One-shot Adventure
Tomb Raider I-III Remastered Starring Lara Croft
Yakuza: Like A Dragon
synopsis: A dramatic genre pivot for the Yakuza series introduces Ichiban Kasuga — a bright-eyed Dragon Quest fan who interprets the world as a JRPG — alongside a brand new turn-based combat system. Set in Yokohama's Isezaki Ijincho district, it is both a love letter to JRPGs and one of the funniest, most emotionally affecting games Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio has produced.
